mapper.select: SELECT * FROM E_M_TENANCE_PROJECT_QUOTA ORDER BY create_time DESC
mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO E_M_TENANCE_PROJECT_QUOTA (quota_code, project_name, project_content, unit, amount)
VALUES (#{quotaCode}, #{projectName}, #{projectContent}, #{unit}, #{amount})
mapper.update:
UPDATE E_M_TENANCE_PROJECT_QUOTA
SET project_name = #{projectName}, project_content = #{projectContent}, unit = #{unit}, amount = #{amount} WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.select: SELECT quota_code FROM E_M_TENANCE_PROJECT_QUOTA WHERE DATE(create_time)=CURDATE() ORDER BY quota_code DESC LIMIT 1
